items.title: Olivia Miles was 2 for 18 on 3s entering today.
items.author: Alexa Philippou
items.body_excerpt:
Olivia Miles was 2 for 18 on 3s entering today. 

She has made 8 of 11 attempts so far tonight against the Valkyries. 

That’s the most 3s made by a rookie in a single game in league history.
